title: Stay Alert
description: Always be aware of your surroundings.

title: Avoid Dark Areas
description: Prefer well-lit roads at night.

title: Share Location
description: Share live location with trusted contacts.

title: Emergency Contact
description: Keep emergency numbers on speed dial.

title: Trust Your Instincts
description: If something feels wrong, leave immediately.

title: Use Safe Transport
description: Prefer verified ride services.

title: Avoid Strangers
description: Do not share personal info with unknown people.

title: Keep Phone Charged
description: Always maintain battery above 20%.

title: Stay Connected
description: Keep someone informed about your route.

title: Walk Confidently
description: Confidence reduces chances of targeting.

title: Use Main Roads
description: Avoid shortcuts through isolated areas.

title: Avoid Distractions
description: Do not use phone while walking in unsafe areas.

title: Stay in Groups
description: Travel with friends when possible.

title: Plan Route
description: Know your route before leaving.

title: Keep SOS Ready
description: Always have emergency SOS app ready.

title: No Oversharing
description: Avoid posting live location on social media.

title: Avoid Alcohol Alone
description: Do not consume alcohol alone in unknown places.

title: Be Visible
description: Wear bright clothes at night.

title: Secure Bags
description: Keep bags close in crowded areas.

title: Watch Exits
description: Always know emergency exits in buildings.

title: Taxi Safety
description: Verify driver before entering ride.

title: Emergency Code
description: Set a safety code word with family.

title: Fake Call Trick
description: Use fake calls to avoid unsafe situations.

title: Keep Distance
description: Maintain safe distance from strangers.

title: Avoid Isolation
description: Stay in populated areas.

title: Know Helplines
description: Save local emergency helplines.

title: Backup Battery
description: Carry power bank for emergencies.

title: Safe Waiting
description: Wait inside shops or safe places.

title: Avoid Night Walks
description: Avoid walking alone at night.

title: GPS On
description: Keep GPS enabled for tracking.

title: Be Confident
description: Confidence can prevent attacks.

title: Avoid Confrontation
description: Do not argue with strangers.

title: Stay Near Crowd
description: Always stay near groups of people.

title: Use Headphones Safely
description: Keep volume low to stay alert.

title: Know Safe Spots
description: Identify safe places in your area.

title: Emergency App
description: Install safety apps on phone.

title: Avoid Unknown Lifts
description: Do not accept rides from strangers.

title: Stay Calm
description: Panic reduces decision making.

title: Practice Escape Plan
description: Know how to react in danger.

title: Fake Emergency Call
description: Call someone to escape danger.

title: Avoid Empty Elevators
description: Wait for crowded lifts.

title: Know Police Station
description: Be aware of nearby police stations.

title: Lock Devices
description: Keep phone and apps secured.

title: Safe Messaging
description: Share quick check-in messages.

title: Stay Observant
description: Notice people around you.

title: Mirror Check
description: Use shop windows or parked car mirrors to see behind you.

title: Digital Footprint
description: Blur your home address on public map photos.

title: Pepper Spray Ready
description: Keep safety tools in your hand, not buried in your bag.

title: Dynamic Pacing
description: Change your walking speed if you feel someone is following.

title: Elevator Protocol
description: Stand near the control panel to reach the alarm easily.

title: Vehicle Perimeter
description: Check the back seat before entering your car.

title: Wi-Fi Caution
description: Avoid using public Wi-Fi for sensitive bank apps.

title: Smart Lock Logic
description: Lock your car doors immediately after getting inside.

title: Key Readiness
description: Have your house keys in hand before reaching the door.

title: Noise Maker
description: Carry a high-decibel personal alarm for instant attention.

title: Privacy Screen
description: Use a screen protector to hide messages in public.

title: Alternative Commute
description: Vary your daily route to remain unpredictable.

title: Check-in Timer
description: Set a 'Safety Timer' that alerts friends if not deactivated.

title: ATM Awareness
description: Cover the keypad and scan for skimmers before use.

title: Shadow Tracking
description: Watch your shadow to detect movement behind you at night.
